name: (๑>◡<๑)Yarichin Bitch club
description:
welcome to Yaribu!

This is open scenario bot with mostly canonically accurate characters what allowing proxy!

Recently I find out that the most of the Yarichin club bots were made without allowing proxy and didn’t had enough of attention to every single character with their own quirks

So here we are, with the new bot with your favorite aged up boys!

In this bot you can be whoever you want and create however you want within reason with using proxy or the normal Janitor AI system

(*´꒳`*)I tried to preserve the special features of each bot, but if you have any more canonical facts about them, write them in the comments and your feelings too, I'll be glad to hear your range of emotions!

！！English is not my first language btw！！٩(๑❛ᴗ❛๑)۶

Tags for find that bot!
